home.heroLede: I build web products where every <mark>detail</mark> holds.
home.quoteText: “Details make perfection, and perfection is not a detail.”
home.beaversBody: Co-founded with my wife. SEO (articles, netlinking), web development and GTM tracking, for agencies and clients.
home.skalpBody: Co-founded with my wife. Single-product e-commerce, built and operated end to end.
home.codeBody: A SaaS for netlinking specialists. Not out yet, built with my usual stack.
home.nextTitle: A family move to Sydney, on a {low} to {high} year horizon.
home.nextBody: That's the strategic reason everything I run is location-independent, and why this site is bilingual, built for an Australian network as much as a French one.

meta.homeTitle: Lucas Attali · Fullstack developer and entrepreneur
meta.homeDescription: Lucas Attali, fullstack developer between the Mediterranean and the Pacific. Co-founder of Beavers and Skalp. Next.js, React, SvelteKit, Svelte, TypeScript, SEO, web development and e-commerce.
meta.aboutDescription: Fullstack developer and entrepreneur in the south of France, co-founder of Beavers and Skalp, Sydney on the horizon. Every detail held, from mockup to production.
meta.experienceDescription: Lucas Attali's career: more than ten years in web, from technical project manager to agency co-founder. SEO, development, Next.js, React, SvelteKit and TypeScript stack.
meta.workDescription: Lucas Attali's work: SEO and development results at Beavers, the build of Skalp, and a netlinking SaaS in the works.

about.aboutLede: Fullstack developer and entrepreneur, I build web products from the south of France. Beavers by day, Skalp on the side, and a product of my own in the works. My obsession fits in a few words: every detail held, from the first mockup to production.
about.aboutP1: I learned the web through engineering, then product, then running a company. Today I co-found Beavers, the agency I started in 2019 with my wife, where I handle SEO (strategy, article writing, netlinking), development (websites, landing pages, contest games) and GTM tracking, for agencies and their clients or directly for clients.
about.aboutPSkalp: With my wife too, I co-found and run Skalp, a single-product e-commerce I build end to end. And right now, I'm developing a product of my own: a SaaS for netlinking specialists, not yet released.
about.aboutP2: The way I work hasn't changed since my first site: clean foundations, typed code, clear separation of concerns, and nothing approximate left behind. 'Details make perfection' isn't a decorative quote here, it's the method.
about.aboutP3: Off-screen, I live near the Mediterranean, I'm slowly doing up a house, and I spend most of my time with my people and on a padel court (left side, always). A shiba inu supervises. And on the horizon, one fixed idea that steers the rest: moving to Sydney.

experience.expH1: From the craft to the company.
experience.expLede: More than ten years building web products, from technical project manager to agency co-founder. Here's the thread.
experience.tlSkalpDesc: Co-founded with my wife. Single-product e-commerce (beanies), built and operated end to end.

experience.tlLiiiDesc: Product and front-end lead on a health platform. VueJS, Pimcore, Sylius.
experience.tlIimDesc: Sharing with students at the school where I trained.

experience.tlSensioDesc: Digital productions for major brands (Samsung, Decathlon, Häagen-Dazs). Technical management, quality and process.
experience.tlConnectDesc: First entrepreneurial venture, on the side.
experience.stackAlso: also worked with: Vue / Nuxt, WordPress, Pimcore, Sylius
experience.stackP2: Separated concerns, typed code, clean foundations.
experience.stackP3: API token permissions kept to the strict minimum.
experience.fcEsilvDesc: Léonard de Vinci School of Engineering

work.realLede: At Beavers I handle SEO and all the development. On the side, I build my own products end to end. Here's a look, with the numbers.
work.realBeaversIntro: What I handle at the agency: SEO and development. Clients anonymized, results kept.
work.realBeaversNote: Results achieved with the Beavers team, on the SEO and development I lead.
work.realSkalpH2: Skalp, a single-product e-commerce, built end to end.
work.realSkalpP: Co-founded with my wife. A single product (beanies), designed and built entirely by hand, from the catalogue to shipping. The shop isn't open yet, so here I show the build, not sales figures.
work.realJcP: I develop contest apps deployed for brands, through agencies or directly. Game mechanics, forms, prize draws, GDPR compliance and tracking, all under campaign pressure (around three months). Cases kept anonymous.
work.jcStat1Lbl: participants on the biggest operations (from 20 to 14,000)
work.nlP: My current product: a B2B tool to manage netlinking campaigns. Not released yet, built with the same stack as the rest.
